Hearing Re: Defendant and Cross-Complainant Getaround, Inc.'s Motion To Bifurcate.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant Getaround, Inc.'s unopposed "motion to bifurcate liability and punitive damages for trial" is granted. (Civ. Code 3295(d).)

The Court will sign the submitted proposed order.
